economic_notes: Two government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method: Sturgeon Lake Resources Ltd. and Sturgeon Lake Developments Co. Ltd. GBEs had combined revenue of $8,381,977 and net loss of $653,990 in 2020. COVID-19 pandemic noted as creating uncertainty for future periods.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2020. Two GBEs (Sturgeon Lake Resources Ltd. and Sturgeon Lake Developments Co. Ltd.) are accounted for by modified equity method and not consolidated. The First Nation companies line in revenue represents the equity loss pick-up of -$653,990. total_government_transfers estimated as WCTC $10,233,191 + ISC Health $1,909,482 + GOA $1,169,909 + CMHC $970,003 = $14,282,585. OSR includes rental income, trust fund revenues, FNDF, surplus distribution, and other revenue net of government transfers. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. Net debt position of $12,232,647. COVID-19 pandemic disclosure included as the fiscal year end coincides with the pandemic declaration.
